chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-348 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 1615/25 2.For hearing of main case 11-04-2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Counsel for petitioner submits that this petition is only respect of providing protection against the harassment being caused by the private respondents, which is legal right of the petitioner. Learned AAG present in Court in other matters waives notice and submits that police official shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the petitioner, as and when required. Under the circumstances, this petition along with listed application is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
